(1) No overclaim — manifest.json and command-evidence.json honestly report production_ready=false / implemented_pending_review; the "..._descriptor_verified" production_ready_flag is scoped to local descriptor validation, and hermes production_ready_candidate=true is the coverage&&foundation local-validation candidate, not an enterprise-trust claim.

(2) Implementation is real and internally consistent across registry.js (EMAIL_DMS_CORE_CP293 pack binding, requirements, no-write attestation), service.js (descriptor/case-set factories + ~40-flag freeze attestation), validators.js (coverage + descriptor + per-row no-leak validation), the contract projection in contracts/email-dms-core-contract.json (deep-equal checked by the validator script), 3 CP293 tests in test/model.test.js, and scripts/validate-rp08-email-dms-core-contract.mjs.

(3) Row arithmetic and distributions match the baseline exactly: phase 106+44=150; deliverables failure_recovery 58 + hermes_evidence 38 + implementation 21 + test 11 + security_audit 10 + claude_review 7 + fixture 5 = 150; micro-title counts sum to 150; first/last unit IDs correct.

(4) Descriptor-only/no-write/no-real-data boundaries hold and were independently confirmed — no child_process/fs-write/fetch/network/db/process.env/eval/new Function calls exist anywhere in packages/email-dms/src; the package is pure Object.freeze data plus pure validation functions.

(5) Claude remains read-only and not final approver (authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, claude_packet.read_only=true, no_write_attestation.promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true).

(7) Hermes control-plane patterns are used only for deterministic descriptor receipt/packet shapes (receipt_shape descriptor_only...no_write, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, executes_command_runtime=false), not product runtime.

(8) Cursor is correct — next-pack-queue live_latest_pack_id=CP00-292 and live_next_unit_id=RP08.P07.M06.S03, making CP00-293 the live-next pack; unrelated dirty files (docx, new-session-handoff.md, c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json) are correctly excluded from pack scope.
